completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning-only feature packet for backup and restore automation. No implementation edits performed during this phase.

Re-reviewed spec.md, design.md, and scopes.md against current repo state before implementation. Confirmed SCN-048-B01..B03 still describe the right behavior; no superseded artifacts; FR-048-001..005 still describe the right product contract.

Implemented internal/backup package (retention.go, status.go, watcher.go), 2 new metrics files in internal/metrics, registered 3 Prometheus collectors, added BACKUP_* fields + parsing + requiredVars() to internal/config/config.go, wired backup watcher goroutine in cmd/core/main.go, added backup: SST section to config/smackerel.yaml, extended scripts/commands/config.sh with 5 required_value reads + env-file writes, rewrote scripts/commands/backup.sh with retention pruning + redacted status JSON + secret scrubbing, added scripts/commands/restore-test.sh disposable drill, wired backup-restore-test subcommand in smackerel.sh, replaced SmackerelBackupStale Prometheus expression with smackerel_backup_last_success_unixtime, updated docs/Operations.md and docs/Deployment.md.

16 adversarial unit tests pass in internal/backup covering retention (T-048-001), status validation (T-048-005), watcher idempotency, ParseArtifactTime malformed-name rejection. Extended internal/config/validate_test.go setRequiredEnv with 5 new BACKUP_* keys so unrelated config tests do not fail loud.

Re-ran the targeted Go suite (./internal/backup/..., ./internal/metrics/..., ./internal/config/..., ./internal/deploy/...) — all packages green. The spec 049 TestMonitoringAlertsContract_LiveFile continues to pass with the new SmackerelBackupStale expression because internal/metrics/backup.go registers smackerel_backup_last_success_unixtime.

Reviewed implementation for simplification opportunities. Backup package reuses existing patterns: Prometheus collectors mirror spec 049 conventions, SST keys flow through scripts/commands/config.sh just like spec 046 NATS keys, restore drill mirrors spec 045 disposable-test-storage shape. Python retention re-implementation in backup.sh intentionally duplicates Go logic so cron-only environments without the Go binary still prune correctly; this is a planned redundancy, not an over-abstraction.

Stability anchors in place: fail-loud SST contract (every BACKUP_* key is required at config-generate time and re-asserted in backup.sh ${VAR:?error} form), atomic status-file writes (<file>.tmp → rename so the watcher never sees a torn read), idempotent gauge updates (Poll() can be called repeatedly without effect), monotonic counter (status counter only advances when last_run_unixtime changes), and defensive copy + sort in SelectKept (input is never mutated).

Security posture: multi-layer secret redaction (1) Status.validate() rejects any payload whose last_error contains a closed-set secret prefix (POSTGRES_PASSWORD=, SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN=, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=, AUTH_*, LLM_API_KEY) — adversarially-tested via TestStatus_ValidateRejectsSecrets with 3 sub-cases; (2) backup.sh::redact_secrets() scrubs 14 closed-set secret env values; (3) restore-test.sh scans psql output for any closed-set secret value and fails the run if any leaks. Status file is chmod 0600. Restore-drill postgres has no published host port (preserves spec 042) and runs on tmpfs (preserves spec 045).

Static audit via repo-standard guards: artifact-lint, traceability-guard, regression-baseline-guard. The new Prometheus alert is mechanically validated by the spec 049 alert-contract test which walks internal/metrics/*.go for every smackerel_* metric name registered; smackerel_backup_last_success_unixtime is now in the known-emitted set.

Adversarial-test chaos at the static contract layer: 8 retention edge cases + 8 status edge cases probe failure modes that would silently break the backup invariant if reintroduced. Each adversarial sub-test would catch a different naive regression.

docs/Operations.md Backup & Restore section rewritten: contract summary (product vs adapter), SST keys table, retention algorithm explanation, status JSON schema, metrics + alert wiring, restore drill command, operator workflow, legacy ad-hoc operations preserved. docs/Deployment.md Spec 048 — Deploy Adapter Backup Contract subsection added: enumerates adapter responsibilities and explicitly forbids overriding retention budget counts.

All guards run: artifact-lint, traceability-guard, regression-baseline-guard. Targeted Go suites pass. gofmt + go vet clean. ./smackerel.sh config generate exits 0 and produces all 5 BACKUP_* keys in dev.env.

Both scopes Done; all DoD items checked with linked evidence pointing at concrete test names, file paths, and content sections; report.md populated with per-DoD evidence map + adversarial regression test inventory + Validation/Audit/Chaos evidence sections. No git operations performed per user constraint.
